grant_title: Not Another Panel, but a Chance to Build Civic Technology
geographic_restrictions: Primarily Pennsylvania, with potential expansion to other states
project_area: AI-powered civic technology solutions for government service delivery
demographic_requirements: Open to government officials, university students, technologists, nonprofits, and private-sector partners with an interest in civic technology and AI
eligibility_summary: Open to government entities, students, technologists, nonprofits, and private-sector partners focused on developing AI-powered solutions for public-sector challenges. Priority given to participants from Pennsylvania, with potential for future events in other states.
